title: Team Context Document Frontmatter
description: Required frontmatter schema for all documents in the team-context knowledge base

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this knowledge unit

type.description: Knowledge type — maps to top-level taxonomy category

domain.description: User-defined domain (e.g., frontend, backend, infra, ai, product, general)

status.description: Lifecycle status of this knowledge unit

confidence.description: How certain — marks the tacit↔explicit spectrum (Nonaka SECI)

source_ref.description: URL or file path pointing to the original source

recorded_at.description: Date when this knowledge was captured (YYYY-MM-DD)

expires.description: TTL — date after which this knowledge should be reviewed or archived

tags.description: Faceted cross-cutting classification tags (Ranganathan faceted classification)

entities.description: Named entities for graph linking (people, projects, technologies, orgs)

context.description: When and why this knowledge is relevant — situated cognition metadata
